guard.title: Vahi moderation
guard.description: Ua fa'ataehia teie api no te mau moderateur e te mau administrateur ana'e.

header.title: Fa'anahoraa o te mau role e te mau fa'autu'araa
header.description: E nehenehe i te administrateur e horo'a i te role ta'ata, moderateur e administrateur. E nehenehe i te moderateur e fa'ateitei noa i te ta'ata matau i te role moderateur.

reports.title: Mau parau i fa'ahapa hia
reports.description: E fā mai te mau fa'ahaparaa apī no te mau parau i'onei no te moderation.
reports.loading: Te fa'a'ī ra i te mau fa'ahaparaa...
reports.empty: Aore e parau i fa'ahapa hia e tia'i ra.
reports.author_missing: Aita te parau e vai nei
reports.content_missing: Aita teie parau e vai fa'ahou nei.
reports.delete_confirm: Tāmi i teie parau i fa'ahapa hia?

accounts.empty: Ha'amata i te imi no te fa'a'ite i te mau account e tere nei, ua tape'ahia aore rā ua opanihia.

messages.post_deleted: Ua tāmihia te parau mai te moderation.

errors.load_reports: Aita i manuia te fa'a'īraa i te mau parau i fa'ahapa hia.
errors.load_accounts: Aita i manuia te fa'a'īraa i te mau account.
errors.update_role: Aita i manuia te fa'ahou i te role.
errors.suspend_until_required: Ma'iti i te mahana hope'a no te tape'araa.
errors.suspend_account: Aita i manuia te tape'a i teie account.
errors.ban_account: Aita i manuia te opani i teie account.
errors.reinstate_account: Aita i manuia te fa'aho'i mai i teie account.
errors.update_report: Aita i manuia te fa'ahou i teie fa'ahaparaa.
errors.reported_post_missing: Aita teie parau i fa'ahapa hia i itehia.
errors.delete_post: Aita i manuia te tāmi i teie parau.
